personas.name: Appreciative User
personas.description: A user who appreciates the overall value and functionality of Medito, finding it helpful for their mental well-being.
goals: To find a reliable and helpful meditation app
To improve their mental well-being and live a more peaceful life
To easily access meditation resources without cost
pain_points: Limited features in the free version
context: Using Medito as part of their daily routine
Recommending Medito to friends and family
Exploring different meditation techniques and sessions

personas.name: Mental Health Seeker
personas.description: A user who uses Medito to improve their mental health and finds it effective in managing stress and anxiety.
goals: To improve their overall mental health
To find a meditation app that truly helps
pain_points: High expectations for the app's effectiveness
context: Using Medito before bed to sleep
Trying different meditation sessions to find what works best
constraints: Difficulty committing to a meditation routine
Sensitive to app's tone and guidance

personas.name: Feature Enthusiast
personas.description: A user who is enthusiastic about Medito's features and functionality, but also suggests improvements.
goals: To have a wide range of meditation sessions and features
To easily navigate and use the app
To provide feedback and influence the app's development
context: Exploring different meditation sessions and features
Providing feedback to the app's developers
Comparing Medito to other meditation apps
constraints: Busy schedule, wants to quickly find sessions
Wants to see continuous improvement and updates

personas.name: Value-Conscious User
personas.description: A user who appreciates Medito's value and pricing, finding it to be a cost-effective solution.
goals: To find a free or low-cost meditation app
To access a wide range of meditation sessions without cost
To appreciate the app's developers and their effort
pain_points: Limited features in the free version
Doubts about the app's long-term viability
context: Using Medito as a free alternative to paid apps
Recommending Medito to friends and family
Appreciating the app's developers and their effort
constraints: Values transparency and fairness in pricing
Wants to support developers who care

personas.name: Frustrated User
personas.description: A user who experiences technical issues and bugs with Medito, leading to frustration.
goals: To use a reliable and bug-free meditation app
To access meditation sessions without interruptions
To report and resolve technical issues
context: Trying to use Medito during a busy schedule
Dealing with technical issues and bugs
Reporting issues to the app's developers
constraints: Values a smooth and reliable user experience
